MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Loretta Najera.
Bryan Bordon, Esq. for Petitioner: Douglas Coughran, as Guardian at litem for: Kaitlyn Coughran, a minor Claimant.
Order waiving an appearance of the Petitioner is in file.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $6,948.12
Medical Expenses $4,012.30
A net balance of $20,844.31 to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, 275 South K Street, Livermore, CA. 94550, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
